reasoning: The report identifies the A1 interface as the root source of high latency and retransmissions, which subsequently cascaded through the Near-RT RIC to affect the E2 and F1 interfaces. This was determined by prioritizing hard errors (retransmissions) and severe latency spikes over throughput fluctuations on other interfaces.
actionable_steps: Inspect the transport network and synchronization between the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC to resolve the high latency and retransmission rates on the A1 interface.
